message:
feat(config): implement non-interactive config inspection (--show,
--paths, --json) with full package/resource resolution TUI

src/main.rs — handle_config() rewrite (~750 lines):
- Replace minimal handle_config(cwd) stub with full async
  handle_config(manager, cwd, show, paths, json) implementation
- Add ConfigResourceKind enum (Extensions, Skills, Prompts, Themes)
  with field_name(), label(), and order() helpers for consistent
  display ordering
- Add ConfigResourceState, ConfigPackageState structs for resolved
  package/resource state tracking
- Add serializable report structs (ConfigPathsReport, ConfigResourceReport,
  ConfigPackageReport, ConfigReport) for --json output
- Add PackageFilterState for multi-select filtering by resource type
- --paths: prints global/project config paths, auth/sessions/packages
  directories, extension index path, and precedence order
- --json: emits full ConfigReport as JSON with paths, precedence,
  config validity, packages with resolved resources
- --show: prints human-readable summary with resolved paths and
  resource counts per scope
- Default (no flags): launches interactive BubbleTea TUI for config
  browsing with keyboard navigation

src/config.rs:
- Add Hash derive to SettingsScope enum to support use as HashMap key
  in the config TUI package grouping logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
